items.title: Get up to 11 feet of reach for high cuts with Greenworks’ 24V 8-inch cordless electric polesaw at $120 (Reg. $160)
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the Greenworks 24V 8-inch Cordless Electric Polesaw with a 2.0Ah battery for $119.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing over at the brand’s direct website. Normally $160 at full price, this model has been keeping around $150 since 2026 began, with the deal here being the first major discount we’ve spotted this year. While the price has gone lower in the past, you’re still looking at a solid 25% markdown here that saves you $40 off the going rate. You can also find some 40V and 80V options discounted alongside many other Greenworks tools in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: How to turn off Instagram’s new Instants feature and retract photos you accidentally shared
items.summary: While the Meta-owned social network billed Instants as a new format to share real-life moments as they’re happening, many users are looking for a way  to turn off the feature, especially those who have ended up accidentally sending images to others not fully understanding how the feature works.

items.summary:
Update 5/14: B&H is also now offering the 48GB/1TB 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro at $300 off as well – this deal is $50 under Amazon’s price for the best we can find.

B&H has remained at least somewhat competitive with Amazon and the other big box retailers on the 2026 MacBook releases. It is, in fact, undercutting Amazon on these 15-inch M5 MacBook Air models, and we just spotted a solid $300 price drop on an M5 Pro MacBook Pro you can’t even buy at Amazon.

items.title: Razer’s Kishi V3 Pro USB-C controller grip for Android and iPhone/iPad just hit a new $106 all-time low
items.summary:
We are now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops Razer’s Kishi V3 Pro USB-C game controller grip down to $105.99 shipped. Don’t forget to clip the on-page coupon to see the discounted price during checkout. This particular model launched last year with a $150 price tag as part of Razer’s Kishi V3 controller lineup. Today’s deal takes $44 off its usual going rate to land it $14 below its previous all-time low and our mention from earlier this year. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this controller to date, making it a particularly solid deal for anyone looking to upgrade their mobile gaming setup. The controller is compatible with Android devices, iPhones, and even the iPad mini, and you can find more details on it below.

items.title: EcoFlow’s expanded 5,120Wh DELTA 3 Ultra Plus power station drops to $1,999 2026 low in flash sale, more from $549
items.summary:
As part of the current EcoFlow Mother’s Day Sale that is approaching its end date, the brand has included another 48-hour flash sale window into the event for up to 61% discounts across four units. While two options are add-on accessories (solar panel or extra battery), and the third is the brand’s portable AC/heater, we are seeing a notable price drop on the DELTA 3 Ultra Plus Portable Power Station with a DELTA 3 Plus Extra Battery for $1,999 shipped, beating out its Amazon pricing by $200. Down from $4,298, we’ve been seeing this bundle holding out at $2,199 since April at Amazon, but this flash sale is giving you two days to jump on an additional $200 savings. It comes as a 53% markdown off the going rate for $2,299 of total savings off the full MSRP, landing it at the best price we have tracked since Black Friday, which was when we last saw the $1,899 low appear. Head below to browse the full lineup of flash offers, or browse the full Mother’s Day sale lineup and bonus savings deals here.

There are loads of these things out there, but this one stands out with a super thin outlet plug. items.title: Anker’s tiny 65W Nano USB-C GaN charger is down to just $22 today
items.summary:
Anker’s 65W Nano USB-C Charger

Buy for $22 (Reg. $30+)

What we love

This tiny Anker charger is great for anyone looking to ditch bulky power adapters for something far more travel-friendly. Anker says it’s around 58% smaller than a standard 61W USB-C charger, and the foldable plug design makes it easy to slip into a backpack or even your pocket. It can deliver up to 65W of power through its single USB-C port, which is enough for charging laptops, tablets, and even the latest iPhones at up to 45W fast charging speeds.
